nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-PNA+EU.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML hetero-edge classification run using the HomoGNNEdgeModel with a PNA message-passing layer, edge updates, link-neighbor sampling, weighted cross entropy, and AdamW scheduling.
nodes.languageNotes: YAML experiment config organized around dataset, train, val, model, gnn, and optim sections.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseEdgeGT.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML hetero-edge classification experiment using GTModel settings for a SparseEdgeGT-style transformer run with link-neighbor sampling and weighted cross entropy.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a dedicated gt section in addition to shared dataset, train, val, model, gnn, and optim sections.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseNodeGT.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML hetero-edge classification experiment using GTModel SparseNodeGT settings with link-neighbor sampling, weighted class loss, and AdamW training.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a gt section for transformer-specific controls alongside standard GraphGym-style sections.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseNodeGT+Ego.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML SparseNodeGT experiment that adds ego identifiers during link-neighbor training while keeping the hetero-edge classification setup and weighted loss.
nodes.languageNotes: Variant YAML extends the base SparseNodeGT pattern with an ego-id training option.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseNodeGT+ports.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML SparseNodeGT experiment that enables port features for the dataset while preserving link-neighbor sampling and edge-level classification.
nodes.languageNotes: Variant YAML adds dataset-level port augmentation to the common AML training layout.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseNodeGT+ports+Ego.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML SparseNodeGT experiment combining dataset port features with ego-id training for hetero-edge classification on transaction edges.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines dataset and training augmentations within the shared AML experiment schema.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseNodeGT+RMP.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML SparseNodeGT experiment with reverse-message-passing style dataset augmentation for hetero-edge classification.
nodes.languageNotes: Variant YAML adds reverse-message-passing controls to the standard AML configuration sections.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseNodeGT-EdgeAttn.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML SparseNodeGT ablation focused on edge-attention behavior while retaining the shared hetero-edge dataset and training settings.
nodes.languageNotes: Ablation config keeps the common GT experiment schema and varies transformer attention behavior.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-HI-SparseNodeGT-EdgeGate.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-HI AML SparseNodeGT ablation focused on edge-gating behavior for transaction-edge classification.
nodes.languageNotes: Ablation YAML uses the same AML training structure while varying edge-gating transformer controls.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-GATE.yaml

nodes.languageNotes: YAML experiment config uses shared dataset, train, val, model, gnn, and optim sections.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-GatedGCN.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-LI AML hetero-edge classification experiment using a GatedGCN layer with weighted cross entropy and AdamW optimization.
nodes.languageNotes: GNN baseline config follows the shared AML experiment schema.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-GINE.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-LI AML hetero-edge classification baseline using a GINE layer, link-neighbor sampling, weighted class loss, and cosine warmup scheduling.
nodes.languageNotes: GNN baseline config keeps model and optimizer structure consistent with the other AML runs.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-GINE+Ego.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-LI AML GINE experiment that adds ego-id training to the standard hetero-edge classification baseline.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-GINE+EU.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-LI AML GINE experiment variant with edge-update behavior for hetero-edge classification.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-GINE+ports.yaml

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-GINE+RMP.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-LI AML GINE experiment with reverse-message-passing style augmentation for hetero-edge classification.

nodes.name: AML-Medium-LI-MLP.yaml
nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-LI AML hetero-edge classification baseline using an MLP-style model comparison point with the same sampling, loss, and optimizer structure.
nodes.languageNotes: Baseline config keeps the shared experiment sections while reducing the model family.

nodes.summary: Configures a Medium-LI AML multi-relation PNA experiment with edge-update behavior for hetero-edge classification.
